raw:

```json
{
  "primary_series": null,
  "rationale": "JKM (Japan-Korea Marker) LNG spot prices are not available on FRED. The closest FRED proxy would be PNGASJPUSDM (Japan LNG import price, monthly), but it is a lagging contract-based series that smooths spot spikes and is monthly only, making sharp shock detection unreliable. Recommend sourcing JKM from S&P Platts or ICE directly. If a FRED proxy must be used, PNGASJPUSDM with threshold_zscore 1.8, window_obs 3, lookback_years 30, direction up would be the fallback.",
  "threshold_zscore": 2.0,
  "window_obs": 3,
  "lookback_years": 30,
  "direction": "up"
}
```

parsed.rationale: JKM (Japan-Korea Marker) LNG spot prices are not available on FRED. The closest FRED proxy would be PNGASJPUSDM (Japan LNG import price, monthly), but it is a lagging contract-based series that smooths spot spikes and is monthly only, making sharp shock detection unreliable. Recommend sourcing JKM from S&P Platts or ICE directly. If a FRED proxy must be used, PNGASJPUSDM with threshold_zscore 1.8, window_obs 3, lookback_years 30, direction up would be the fallback.
